covenant_terms.noi_definition: NOI from trailing 12 month actuals normalized by lender
covenant_terms.debt_service_definition: Annual debt service on this loan

covenant_terms.valuation_method: Most recent appraisal or lender mark

covenant_terms.sweep_description: 50% of surplus cash flow when DSCR exceeds 1.40

loan_document_excerpts.dscr_covenant: Borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio of not less than 1.25x on a trailing twelve (12) month basis, tested quarterly. DSCR shall be calculated as Net Operating Income for the preceding twelve (12) month period divided by Debt Service payable during the same period. NOI shall be calculated per the Valuation Standard attached as Exhibit B-1.
loan_document_excerpts.ltv_covenant: The Loan-to-Value ratio, calculated as the then-outstanding principal balance divided by the then-current fair market value of the Mortgaged Property, shall not exceed 78.0%. LTV shall be tested quarterly based on the most recent appraisal or, if no appraisal is performed in the calendar quarter, the most recent independent appraisal on file.
loan_document_excerpts.cash_sweep_provision: In any calendar quarter where the Borrower achieves a Debt Service Coverage Ratio exceeding 1.40x on a trailing twelve (12) month basis, 50% of Cash Flow (as defined herein) shall be applied to prepay the Loan, without premium or penalty. Remaining Cash Flow may be retained by Borrower or distributed to equity holders at Borrower's discretion.
